title: Paw Prints on My Heart
subtitle: A Guided Grief Journal for the Loss of a Beloved Dog
author: Eleanor Hartley
art_prompt: soft pastel watercolor wraparound landscape at dawn, a large dog sitting in the lower-right foreground seen from behind, prominent and close to the viewer, facing away across a wide tranquil river valley with a rainbow bridge, the open scenery sweeping away into the distance to the left, empty calm sky on the left, tender, gentle light, no text, no words
